Thanks for contributing! A few notes:

- ComposureCDK is pre-release (0.x). For anything beyond a small, obvious fix,
  please open an issue first so we can agree on the approach. See CONTRIBUTING.md.
- Use Conventional Commits for the PR title (feat:, fix:, docs:, ...).
- Do not edit CHANGELOG.md files — they are generated by the release process.
-->

## Checklist

- [ ] Linked to an issue (or it's a small, obvious fix)
- [ ] `npm run verify` passes locally
- [ ] Tests added/updated for the change
